assertionResults.reason: In Members panel, owner invitation was sent with role=Owner and appeared in Pending Invitations with matching email and role label.

observations: Pending Invitations list showed testuser-owner-controls-rerun-owner2-20260416@example.com with Owner role badge and Pending status.

assertionResults.reason: Viewer had restricted controls and received 403 on scenario creation attempt; Admin could access editing controls but lacked owner-only member/org management settings; Owner had full org-management controls including invite role assignment, member role change/remove controls, and rename/delete org settings.

observations: Viewer: Add Employee and Import CSV were disabled; invitation accepted and org became selectable.
Admin: Members panel showed member list and pending invites, but no Invite Member form and no Rename/Delete Organization settings.
Owner: Members panel showed Invite Member form with Viewer/Admin/Owner role options, Change role/Remove member actions, and Rename/Delete Organization settings.
network: Viewer action: POST /api/orgs/69e1cffd5a799536c8e08bc9/scenarios triggered Request failed with status code 403.
Admin authorization probe from browser session: DELETE /api/orgs/69e1cffd5a799536c8e08bc9 returned 403.
evidence.consoleErrors: expected authorization error observed: Request failed with status code 403 when viewer attempted restricted scenario creation
